answer:
For me, I just aim to achieve proficiency in English to enhance my career prospects, travel the world, study abroad, or simply broaden my horizons.
The length of time one has had this goal can vary. ​I may have had this goal since childhood and I truly hope I can succeed. 
The difficulty level of fulfilling this goal depends on several factors such as the prior exposure to English, my motivation, available resources, and the learning methods I employ. Learning any language requires consistent effort, dedication, and practice. However, with proper guidance, effective study strategies, and immersion in English-speaking environments, it is certainly achievable.
Overall, English exams play a crucial role in assessing language competence and certifying proficiency levels, allowing me to progress in academic, professional, or personal pursuits. ​It will be beneficial for me to achieve this goal.
title:
Talk about a goal or ambition you have.
What is it?
How long have you had this goal?
How difficult will it be to fulfill it?
